# Architecture — giapha-os

## Layer Structure

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────┐
│  Pages (app/**/page.tsx)            │  ← Next.js App Router
├─────────────────────────────────────┤
│  Components (components/*.tsx)      │  ← "use client" React components
├─────────────────────────────────────┤
│  Server Actions (app/actions/*.ts)  │  ← "use server" — DB mutations
├─────────────────────────────────────┤
│  Utils (utils/*.ts)                 │  ← Pure functions (lineage, csv, etc.)
├─────────────────────────────────────┤
│  Supabase Client (utils/supabase/)  │  ← DB queries, auth, storage
└─────────────────────────────────────┘
```

## Data Flow

```
User Action → Component ("use client")
  → Server Action ("use server")
    → Supabase Client → PostgreSQL
  ← revalidatePath()
  ← router.refresh()
```

## Key Patterns

- **Server Actions** cho tất cả mutations (không REST API)
- **`revalidatePath`** sau mỗi mutation để invalidate Next.js cache
- **Pure functions** trong `utils/` — không phụ thuộc React/Supabase
- **Client components** chiếm đa số (`"use client"`)
- **Supabase RLS** (Row Level Security) cho tenant isolation (không có merchant_id — single-tenant family tree)

## Shared Dependencies

| Component | Dùng |
|-----------|------|
| RelationshipManager | recomputeLineage, supabase client, Person type |
| LineageManager | computeGenerations/BirthOrders/InLaws (from utils/lineage) |
| FamilyTree | D3, Person/Relationship types |
| MemberList | MemberListContext, supabase queries |
